_comment: Per-county WIN dispatch policy, seeded from 'Spreadsheet of WIN Volunteers for dispatchers update March 24.xlsx' (17 sheets, Areas 01-16). Policy is a standing overlay that can only tighten the count-based recommendation (turn a dispatch into a named referral); it never invents a dispatch. County keys match docs/data/county_capacity.json where present. dispatch_enabled is the only required field. allowed_issues is 'all' or a subset of ['capture','transport','rvs_capture']. species_scope null = all species. time_windows reserved for future use.
_source_spreadsheet: data/Spreadsheet of WIN Volunteers for dispatchers update March 24.xlsx
_generated_note: Hand-transcribed from the Instructions column; referral phone numbers cross-referenced against docs/data/facilities.json and docs/data/rehabbers.json. Phone numbers stored as digit-only strings.
